message:
feat(tui,loader,tests): time-travel and sprint view modes, JSONL text parsing, schema validation, history rotation

TUI (src/tui.rs — +2236 lines):
- Add TimeTravelDiff view mode allowing users to browse historical issue
  states by entering a git ref and comparing current vs past snapshots
- Add Sprint view mode with navigation between sprint periods, showing
  velocity metrics and issue flow across sprints
- Enhance history file tree with filtered bead commit display
- Add time travel ref input handling with git-ref validation
- Improve board/graph/actionable/insights detail focus views with
  dedicated snapshot tests

Loader (src/loader.rs):
- Add `parse_issues_from_text()` function for parsing JSONL directly
  from `git show` output, enabling time-travel feature to read
  historical issue states without checkout

Tests:
- tests/schema_validation.rs: New comprehensive schema validation test
  suite (+252 lines) verifying JSONL field contracts
- tests/cli_model_validation.rs: CLI model validation tests
- tests/e2e_export_pages.rs: Export pages e2e tests
- tests/e2e_workspace_history.rs: Workspace history e2e tests
- New snapshot files for board/graph/actionable/insights detail focus
  and main-with-priority-hints views

History cleanup:
- Remove 20 superseded .br_history snapshot files from 2026-03-05
  through 2026-03-08 that were replaced by newer snapshots
- Add 38 new .br_history snapshots from 2026-03-09 session

Beads: Updated issues.jsonl with current issue state
Snapshots: Updated graph medium/narrow/wide snapshots to reflect TUI changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
